title: Bad Dream Death
description: Like the memes. For when you are playing with keepInventory + doImmediateRespawn.
body:
Like the memes, for when you play with keepInventory + immediateRespawn enabled. Happy to do some mixing and provide alternatives like bang sound, ear ringing, etc. Just leave a comment.

Will extend support to versions other than 1.21.5 if desired - let me know in the discord



_Current sound credits:_

_Sharp Breath_: deep breath-in male 01.wav by klankbeeld -- https://freesound.org/s/149111/ -- License: Attribution 4.0
